meaning: adj.无足轻重地,微不足道地,无用的
examples: Who's been fiddling with the TV again?
I've been fiddling about with this design for ages.
He was fiddling with his keys while he talked to me.
Or maybe it was the result of the 59th attempt of fiddling with the concept.
After 10 infuriating minutes of fiddling, I got up and found the master switch.
